title: 幕間　愛する準備はできている

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fuji Kiseki's days are sweet as a dream.

text_block_list.name: Rito Dorm Resident
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Good morning! I'm so glad to be able to see your
beautiful smile first thing in the...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm? Hold still for a second.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: There, got it!

text_block_list.name: Rito Dorm Resident
text_block_list.text: U-um, was there something on me?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Just a little flower petal. Hehe. Perhaps it mistook
you for a fairy.

text_block_list.name: Rito Dorm Resident
text_block_list.text: Swoon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the mornings, she treats the students in her
dorm to lovely smiles.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan A
text_block_list.text:
E-excuse me, Fuji! I made some cookies in home
ec today and was wondering if you'd like them!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Wow, can I really have these? I'll be sure to savor
them! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan A
text_block_list.text: Aaah! I did it! I gave them to her!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Say, Fuji... How many students have you got
cookies from already today?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Let's see... Five, I think?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Five?! What the heck?! Is it Valentine's Day or
somethin'?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan B
text_block_list.text: Fuji! Please take these cookies too!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan C
text_block_list.text:
A-and mine too! I was thinking of you while I
baked them!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Why, my sweet ponies, there's no need to rush!
I'm not going anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fans
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At lunch, she captures the hearts of all the
students on campus.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan D
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh my gosh! You look so regal and beautiful
sitting by yourself and gazing up at the night sky!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Good evening, dear pony! It must be fate that
brought us together this night.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to do a bit of stargazing with me?
They're stunning today.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan D
text_block_list.text: M-me?! But I don't want to be a bother!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Nonsense. In fact, having you with me would
make this moment all the lovelier.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Won't you give me the pleasure of basking in
your company?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan D
text_block_list.text: Ohhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And at night, she utterly enthralls any student she
happens upon. Fuji Kiseki's days are sweet as a
dream.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm? Is someone calling me?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan D
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'm sorry for disturbing you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! So it was you, my precious pony? Your
voice sounded so sweet, I thought it was an angel.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If you have time, why don't you join me? The
night sky is unbelievably beautiful tonight.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan D
text_block_list.text: Aaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And at night, she utterly enthralls any student she
happens upon. Fuji Kiseki's days are sweet as a
dream.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! I wasn't expecting it to rain. Time to wrap
up my stargazing session.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hello there, lovely pony! Would you like to head
back together since it's raining?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan D
text_block_list.text: O-oh, yes please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And at night, she utterly enthralls any student she
happens upon. Fuji Kiseki's days are sweet as a
dream.
